bugs.description: timingSafeEqual throws RangeError when buffers have different lengths (DoS vector)
Refresh token stored in plain text in DB and queried directly (findUnique by plain token). If DB leaks, all sessions are compromised.
bugs.snippet_current: const session = await prisma.session.findUnique({ where: { refreshToken: currentRefreshToken } });
bugs.patch:
1. Hash the incoming token: const hash = hashToken(currentRefreshToken);
2. Query by hash: findUnique({ where: { refreshTokenHash: hash } })
3. Remove @unique from refreshToken column
4. Make refreshTokenHash @unique
5. Run migration

bugs.description: Temp file not deleted when Cloudinary upload fails (returns null). Disk-fill DoS over time.
Temp file not deleted after SUCCESSFUL Cloudinary upload. Every upload leaves permanent copy on server disk.
Regex-based XSS sanitizer is bypassable. Examples: (unquoted handler),
bugs.snippet_current:
function sanitizeValue(value: string): string {
    return value
        .replace(/<script[^>]*>[\s\S]*?<\/script>/gi, '')
        .replace(/on\w+\s*=\s*["'][^"']*["']/gi, '')
        ...

bugs.description: Same bypassable regex XSS sanitizer (duplicated from config.ts)
bugs.patch: Same fix: use sanitize-html library. Extract to shared util.

bugs.description: apiAuth() has no try/catch around fetch() — network errors cause unhandled promise rejections, crashing the calling function silently
editDish uses JSON.stringify in onclick attribute — breaks on special characters (quotes, backslashes, Unicode)
Logout endpoint does not require authentication. Anyone with a refresh token can invalidate sessions.
bugs.patch:
Add requireAuth middleware:
router.post('/logout', requireAuth, async (req: AuthenticatedRequest, res, next) => {

bugs.description: Login schema allows 6-char passwords while change-password enforces 8+. Old weak passwords remain valid forever.
bugs.snippet_current: password: z.string().min(6, 'Senha deve ter no mínimo 6 caracteres')
bugs.patch: password: z.string().min(8, 'Senha deve ter no mínimo 8 caracteres')

bugs.description: Lightbox missing role='dialog', aria-modal='true'. No focus trap — Tab key focuses elements behind overlay. prevImage/nextImage crash on empty gallery (modulo by zero).
bugs.patch:
<div id="lightbox" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-label="Visualizador de imagens" class="fixed inset-0 ... hidden">

Also add: if (galleryImages.length === 0) return; in prevImage/nextImage

bugs.description: verifyPrices silently allows checkout on network error — stale/wrong prices could be sent to WhatsApp
bugs.snippet_current: catch(err) { console.error('Price verify failed', err); return true; }

bugs.description: Duplicate fetchConfig call — config is already loaded in app.js but orderModal fetches it again
bugs.patch:
Use window._siteConfig from app.js instead of duplicate fetch:
const config = window._siteConfig || await fetch('/api/config').then(r=>r.json()).then(d=>d.data);

bugs.description: Shared Zod validators are never imported — dead code. Auth route defines its own inline schemas.
bugs.patch: Either import these in auth.ts route or delete the file to avoid confusion.

bugs.description: printQRCode uses document.write() which blocks parser and can cause issues in some browsers
Uses deprecated performance.timing API — should use PerformanceNavigationTiming
Double-tap prevention on all buttons/links is a mobile anti-pattern that violates user expectations
bugs.patch: Remove double-tap prevention entirely, or limit to submit buttons only.

bugs.description: slugify() and escapeHTML() are duplicated in errors.ts, categories.ts, and dishes.ts
bugs.patch: Import from utils/errors.ts in routes instead of redefining.
